gate_finding.summary: TestFlight Build Info gate failed: stamped commit's committed source does not have the stamped build number.
evidence: Walk of all pbxproj-touching commits between 2026-05-01 and 2026-05-08 shows every such commit's CURRENT_PROJECT_VERSION is 20260417081904; no commit on main has 20260417081911.

Visible Build Info fields (Commit, Full commit, Tag) all lack a -dirty suffix, suggesting GitStatus reports clean even though the build number does not match committed source. The screenshot is cropped just above the GitStatus row; direct confirmation of GitStatus is deferred to the follow-up audit slice.
gate_finding.inferred_likely_diagnosis: GitStatus = clean (stamp script did not catch the discrepancy)
alternative_diagnoses_to_rule_out: Archive-time build-number mutation after the stamp script ran but before binary signing.
Post-archive build-number rewrite in App Store Connect or by a release automation step.
Stamp script reading a mutated pbxproj that was never committed and never marked dirty.

screenshots.name: 01-build-info
screenshots.description: Build Info screen captured from the TestFlight install; preserved as evidence of the gate failure, not as evidence of TestFlight behavior.
